title: Ecommerce Profit Margin Calcualtor - The Ultimate Guide Inc Free Google Sheet
metaDescription: Learn how to accurately calculate your ecommerce profit margin using our free COGS & profit calculator template. Perfect for Shopify, Amazon, and DTC brands looking to improve profitability.

eCommerce Profit Calculator: Find Your True Profit Margins (Not Just Revenue)

Most online stores look profitable on the surface — until cash starts disappearing. Advertising costs creep up, shipping gets more expensive, refunds pile in, and suddenly your “healthy” margins don’t feel so healthy anymore.

That’s exactly why we built the Verve AI eCommerce Profit Calculator.

This free, web-based ecommerce profit calculator and ecommerce margin calculator helps merchants understand true profitability per order, factoring in all the hidden costs most spreadsheets miss.

Try The Free Ecommerce Profit Margin Calculator.

What Is the Verve AI eCommerce Profit Calculator?

The Verve AI eCommerce Profit Calculator is a free online tool that calculates:

  • True landed cost of goods (COGS)

  • Net profit per order

  • Real profit margin %

It’s designed for merchants selling on Shopify, WooCommerce, or any other eCommerce platform — especially those sourcing products internationally.

Unlike basic margin calculators, this tool goes far beyond:

  • Product cost vs selling price

  • Gross margin shortcuts

Instead, it shows you where profit is actually being made (or lost).

Who This Tool Is For

This calculator is ideal for:

  • eCommerce store owners

  • Shopify & WooCommerce merchants

  • Dropshippers and private label sellers

  • Brands importing products internationally

  • Anyone who wants accurate profit margins, not guesses

If you’ve ever asked “Am I actually making money on this product?” — this tool is for you.

Try the Free Verve AI Profit Calculator

Revenue for show, Profit for dough…

Try for Free

Tool Overview: Two Calculators in One

The tool is split into two powerful tabs, each solving a different part of the profitability puzzle.

Tab 1: Landed COGS Calculator

This section calculates your true landed cost per unit, including all sourcing, logistics, and fulfillment costs.

Product Information

Field Description Product Name Optional identifier Supplier Product Cost (Per Unit) Base cost paid to supplier Shipment Quantity Units in the shipment

Shipping & Import Costs

Field Description Freight Cost (Total) Shipping cost for the full shipment Freight Insurance (Total) Insurance for the shipment Import Duty (%) Duty applied to product value FX Rate Converts purchase currency to retail currency Import Brokerage Fees (Total) Customs/broker fees

Warehousing & Fulfillment

Field Description Packaging Cost (Per Unit) Local packaging costs Warehouse Receiving Fee (Per Unit) Storage/handling fee Loss Rate (%) Damage, theft, or shrinkage

Calculated Results

The calculator automatically shows:

  • Freight cost per unit

  • Insurance per unit

  • Duties per unit

  • Brokerage per unit

  • FX-adjusted base cost

  • Final Landed COGS (highlighted)

This alone makes it one of the most accurate ecommerce margin calculators available.

Tab 2: Profit Calculator

Using the landed COGS from Tab 1, this section calculates net profit after all selling costs.

Pricing

Field Description Selling Price (Tax Exclusive) Retail price Discount Rate (%) Average discount applied

Fees & Shipping

Field Description Transaction Fee (%) Payment processor fees Platform Fee Fixed marketplace fee Shipping Cost to Customer Outbound shipping

Marketing & Acquisition

Field Description Affiliate / Influencer Payout Commission per sale CAC Customer acquisition cost

Operations

Field Description Refund Rate (%) % of orders refunded Avg. Support Time (mins) Support time per order Cost per Support Hour Support staff hourly cost

Try the Free Verve AI Profit Calculator

Revenue for show, Profit for dough…

Try for Free

Profit Breakdown: Clear, Step-by-Step

The results are shown as a transparent calculation flow:

Revenue

  • Selling price

  • Discounts

  • Net revenue

Costs

  • Landed COGS

  • Transaction fees

  • Platform fees

  • Shipping

  • Affiliate payouts

  • CAC

  • Support costs

  • Refund impact

Profit

  • Net Profit Per Order (green or red)

  • Net Profit Margin %

No black boxes. No vague “estimates”.

From Profit Insight to Better Inventory Decisions (Shopify)

Knowing your true margins is powerful — but it’s only step one.

Once you understand which products are profitable, the next challenge is knowing:

  • What to reorder

  • When to reorder

  • How much cash you should commit

That’s where Verve AI for Shopify comes in.

Verve AI connects directly to your Shopify store and uses real sales data to:

  • Forecast demand at variant level

  • Reduce stockouts and overstocks

  • Improve cash flow and purchasing decisions

View the Verve AI Shopify app on the Shopify App Store.

Many merchants use this profit calculator to validate margins — then use Verve AI to scale the winners with confidence.

Multi-Currency Support (Built for Global Sourcing)

The calculator supports separate purchase and retail currencies:

  • USD ($)

  • GBP (£)

  • EUR (€)

  • CAD (C$)

  • AUD (A$)

You set:

  • Purchase currency for supplier, freight, insurance, brokerage

  • Retail currency for pricing and profit display

The FX rate automatically converts everything correctly — while local warehousing costs remain in retail currency.

Perfect for brands importing internationally.

Scenario Comparison: Compare Up to 3 Strategies

You can save up to three scenarios and compare them side-by-side.

Compare:

  • Different products

  • Different suppliers

  • Pricing changes

  • Discount strategies

Each scenario shows:

  • Landed COGS

  • Net profit

  • Profit margin

You can reload or delete scenarios at any time.

Turn Margin Clarity into Forecasting Accuracy (WooCommerce)

If you’re running a WooCommerce store, margin clarity becomes even more valuable when paired with demand forecasting.

The Verve AI WooCommerce Inventory Forecasting plugin helps merchants:

  • Plan reorders based on real demand

  • Avoid tying up cash in slow-moving stock

  • Align purchasing decisions with actual profitability

View the Verve AI WooCommerce plugin.

Used together, the profit calculator and forecasting plugin help close the loop between margin analysis and inventory execution.

Why Use This eCommerce Profit Calculator?

  • Free to use

  • Extremely detailed

  • Multi-currency support

  • Reveals hidden costs

  • Scenario comparison

  • Exportable PDF reports

Most importantly — it helps you stop guessing and start making profit-driven decisions.

Built by Verve AI

This calculator is part of Verve AI’s broader mission to help merchants:

  • Avoid stockouts

  • Reduce overstocks

  • Improve cash flow

  • Make smarter purchasing decisions

Try our free ecommerce profit margin calculator and transform your business. Revenue feels good, profit builds businesses.

AI Forecasting Software for E-Commerce Businesses
